title: Subscription Plans
subtitle: Choose the plan that works for you
noPlans: No plans available at the moment
premiumDescription: Upgrade to unlock this feature and many more.
faq1A: Yes, you can cancel your subscription at any time. You'll keep access until the end of your billing period.
faq2Q: What happens after the free trial?
faq2A: After the trial ends, you'll be moved to the free plan. No automatic charges.
faq3A: We offer a 30-day money-back guarantee for all paid plans.
upgradePromptCustomTheme: Custom theme creation is a premium feature. Upgrade your subscription to create personalized themes. Light and dark themes are available for free.
upgradePromptAdvancedAnalytics: Advanced Analytics is a premium feature. Upgrade your subscription to access detailed insights and analytics across all modules.
